nodes.name: Common jery
nodes.summary: The common jery (Neomixis tenella) is a species of bird in the family Cisticolidae. It is endemic to Madagascar. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry forest and subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest. It was first described in 1866 by Gustav Hartlaub. References
nodes.shortSummary: The common jery (Neomixis tenella) is a species of bird in the family Cisticolidae. It is endemic to Madagascar.

nodes.name: Neomixis
nodes.summary: Neomixis（Neomixis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联3种鸟类，如Common jery、Green jery、Stripe-throated jery。
